problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
